All rimir plugins with a `settings` tiddler automatically appear in ControlPanel > Settings > Rimi Plugins. ## License MIT -- see [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md) ","type":"text/x-markdown"},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/changelog","created":"20260305110506502","modified":"20260305110506502","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! <$list filter="[plugin-type[plugin]prefix[$:/plugins/rimir/]!title[$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook]sort[name]]"> <$let isActive={{{ [[$:/state/rimir/core-hook/selected]get[text]matchthen[rr-settings-plugin-active]else[]] }}} classes={{{ [[rr-settings-plugin-item ]addsuffix] }}} > <$button class=<> set="$:/state/rimir/core-hook/selected" setTo=<>> <$transclude $tiddler={{{ [addsuffix[/icon]] }}} size="16pt"/> <$text text={{{ [get[name]] ~[split[/]last[1]] }}}/> v<$text text={{{ [get[version]] }}}/>

"},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/architecture":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/architecture","created":"20260305110506503","modified":"20260305110506503","rdt.order":"2","rdt.plugin-key":"core-hook","rdt.plugin-name":"core hook","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Unified settings hub for rimir plugins","rdt.section":"Architecture","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Plugin discovery The hub uses a single TW filter to find all rimir plugins: ``` [plugin-type[plugin]prefix[$:/plugins/rimir/]!title[$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook]sort[name]] ``` This excludes `core-hook` itself from the sidebar list. !! State management Selected plugin is stored in `$:/state/rimir/core-hook/selected`. If no selection exists, the filter auto-selects the first plugin alphabetically. The active sidebar item gets a `rr-settings-plugin-active` class via a `$let` + filter comparison. !! Settings resolution For the selected plugin `$:/plugins/rimir/`, the hub appends `/settings` and checks if that tiddler exists (across shadows + real tiddlers). If found, it transcludes the settings panel. If not, it falls back to `default-panel.tid`. !! Naming convention | !Pattern | !Purpose | | `$:/plugins/rimir//settings` | Settings panel (hub content + plugin detail tab) | | `$:/plugins/rimir//icon` | Plugin icon (sidebar + header) | !! CSS classes All styles use the `rr-settings-` prefix, defined in the theme plugin's `styles.tid`. The hub layout is a flex container with a fixed-width sidebar and flexible content area. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/overview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/overview","created":"20260305110506503","modified":"20260305110506503","rdt.hub-category":"infrastructure","rdt.hub-category-name":"Infrastructure","rdt.hub-order":"1","rdt.order":"1","rdt.plugin-key":"core-hook","rdt.plugin-name":"core hook","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Unified settings hub for rimir plugins","rdt.section":"Overview","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! What it does Adds a ''Rimi Plugins'' top-level tab to the ControlPanel. The tab shows a vertical sidebar listing all installed rimir plugins, with a content area that displays each plugin's settings panel or a default info card. !! Features * ''Dynamic discovery'' — automatically lists all plugins with title prefix `$:/plugins/rimir/` * ''Vertical sidebar'' — click any plugin to view its settings; active plugin highlighted with accent border * ''Auto-selection'' — first plugin selected on load (no blank content) * ''Fallback panel'' — plugins without settings show an info card with a link to documentation * ''Dual-purpose settings'' — the same `settings` tiddler appears both in the hub and in TW's built-in plugin detail view !! How plugins opt in Create a tiddler titled `$:/plugins/rimir//settings` inside your plugin. The hub transcludes it as the content panel. Add `"settings"` to the `list` field in `plugin.info` so TW's plugin info view also shows a settings tab. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/documentation":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/documentation","created":"20260305110506504","modified":"20260305110506504","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<%if [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]has[plugin-type]] %> <$tiddler tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/overview"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/overview"/> <%else%> To display this documentation, the plugin [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]] needs to be installed. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/readme","created":"20260305110506504","modified":"20260305110506504","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! core hook Unified settings hub for all rimir plugins. Adds a "Rimi Plugins" tab to ControlPanel > Settings with a vertical sidebar listing all installed rimir plugins and their settings. !! Key features * ''Dynamic discovery'' — automatically finds all installed `$:/plugins/rimir/*` plugins * ''Vertical sidebar'' — plugin list with icons, names, and version badges * ''Auto-discovery of settings'' — transcludes each plugin's `settings` tiddler as content panel * ''Fallback panel'' — plugins without settings show an info card with link to documentation !! Prerequisites No external prerequisites. !! Quick start Install plugin. All rimir plugins with a `settings` tiddler automatically appear in ControlPanel > Settings > Rimi Plugins. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/settings":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/settings","created":"20260305110506504","modified":"20260305110506504","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"
No configurable settings. This plugin provides the settings hub framework.
"}}}
